Comprehensive income, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials, energy costs and freight
candidates.why: Direct production/input cost line; best match for cost of goods sold/cost of sales.

candidates.row_label: Restructuring costs in raw materials, energy costs and freight
candidates.why: Restructuring item, not recurring COGS.
Inventory balance sheet item, not income statement expense.

candidates.row_label: Raw materials energy costs and freight - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row should be excluded when the underlying component exists.

final_choice.row_label: Raw materials, energy costs and freight

variables.notes: Used the recurring direct cost line; excluded restructuring and balancing rows.

candidates.why: Overhead bucket, but a more explicit SG&A row exists.
Explicit SG&A row and populated in multiple years; preferred under the SG&A hierarchy.

Balance sheet/intangible contra account, not SG&A expense.
Balance sheet liability, not SG&A expense.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense label; best match for XRD.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet balancing row, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: Mapped to the dedicated R&D line. It appears in a supplemental section below operating profit, so it was not also added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and other financial items
candidates.why: Single recurring finance cost total available consistently; preferred over potentially overlapping subcomponents to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expenses on Capital Financing, Gross
candidates.why: Semantically relevant but not visibly populated; also may overlap with broader interest expense lines.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Recurring interest component, but likely included in broader interest expense totals.
Semantically strong, but visible values are absent and may duplicate other interest rows.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Capital Financing - Gross
candidates.why: Relevant component for some years, but incomplete across years and may overlap with broader interest expense.
Should be excluded from expense because it reduces/offsets reported interest cost rather than representing standalone recurring expense to add.
Strong interest label for several years, but likely overlaps with lease/capital financing components.
Finance-related but not core borrowing interest; lower priority.
May include non-interest items; not ideal standalone.
Derivative-related, likely valuation/non-recurring rather than recurring interest expense.
Not finance cost.
Not finance cost.

candidates.why: Supplemental component and likely duplicative of the main lease-interest line.
Balance sheet derivative, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Share of net income/(loss) in equity-accounted investees
candidates.why: Income statement earnings item, not book equity.
Income attribution line on income statement, not balance sheet equity balance.

candidates.row_label: OCI - Share of other comprehensive income of equity-accounted investees, excluding remeasurements
candidates.why: OCI component, not equity balance.

candidates.row_label: Net gain/(loss) on equity instruments at fair value through other comprehensive income
candidates.why: OCI component, not equity balance.

final_choice.row_label: Total equity attributable to shareholders of the parent
